meaning: n.(显示器或电视机图象的)像素
examples: You are getting more computing power per pixel.
Web designers are much more than pixel pushers.
The whole pixel can thus be tuned to reflect any desired colour.
Side note: Each attendee here (close to 6, 000) will get the Chromebook Pixel, the high-end netbook.
The distinct look and feel remain unchanged, while the pixel count has obviously increased.
